pages.text: $(italic)Create Crafts & Additions$() bridges rotation and $(bold)Forge Energy (FE)$() — the electricity standard the rest of your tech mods (Powah, and so on) speak.$(br2)$(li)$(bold)Alternator$() — turn rotation into FE.$(li)$(bold)Electric Motor$() — turn FE back into rotation, at a speed you set.$(li)$(bold)Connectors & Wires$() — carry FE between machines.
pages.title: Rotation ↔ FE

pages.text: $(li)$(bold)Accumulator$() — an FE battery to bank surplus power.$(li)$(bold)Induction Heater$() — electric heat for mixers and basins, replacing the Blaze Burner where you have spare current.$(li)$(bold)Portable Energy Interface$() — moves FE on and off contraptions.$(br2)This is the join between Create and the pack's other power systems — store rotation as FE, ship it, and spin it back up on demand.
pages.title: Storage & Heat
